title: lgwks.daemon.event.v2
description: Normalized daemon event envelope (v2 — 'event_envelope'). Additive superset of v1: every v1 field is retained, every new field is OPTIONAL, and the `kind` enum is widened as a superset, so v1 records validate unchanged at the Python boundary (lgwks_daemon_event.validate_event accepts both v1 and v2). v2 adds the orthogonal `source` axis (where the event entered), `payload_cid` (content-addressed out-of-band payload, axiom CID scheme), `trust` (trust class — model output is untrusted until typed), `provenance` (back-references to source events/artifacts), and `replay` (migration/replay metadata). `source` and `trust` are the locked public join keys read by #120/#121/#122/#124.

source.description: v2: where the event entered the daemon, orthogonal to `kind`.

payload_cid.description: v2: content-address of an out-of-band payload (axiom CID scheme, `<alg>:<64-hex>`).

trust.description: v2: trust class of the event. Model output is untrusted until converted to a typed action.

provenance.description: v2: back-references to the source events/artifacts this event derives from.

replay.description: v2: migration/replay metadata. `schema_from` marks events upgraded from v1 by the lazy adapter.
